name: lane
description: Agent-native payments in Claude Code. Drives Lane's deterministic purchase flow — draft a purchase intent, approve it with a passkey, then let checkout-mcp autonomously complete the buy — over the hosted intent-mcp and checkout-mcp servers. Auto-installs the Lane CLI.

lane_api_key.title: Lane API key
lane_api_key.description: Authenticates to the intent-mcp and checkout-mcp servers. Get one by running `lane-cli init` to log in (stored in ~/.lane/config.json as "apiKey"), or from the Lane dashboard. You can leave this blank now and set it later from /plugin after you log in.
